name: Ochoa's Mexican Restaurant
tagline: Family-made Mexican food in Sebastopol, more than 30 years on
seoDescription: Ochoa's Mexican Restaurant has served fresh, made-to-order Mexican food in Sebastopol for over 30 years — chile verde burritos, birria tacos, fish tacos, and a vegan McDougall burrito, all made fresh daily on Gravenstein Hwy.

sections.eyebrow: Sebastopol · Mexican · 30+ years on Gravenstein Hwy
sections.heading: Fresh Mexican food, made the way the Ochoa family has always made it
sections.subheading: A small, family-run kitchen on Gravenstein Highway where everything is made to order and made fresh daily — from the chile verde burrito to the birria tacos that bring people in from across Sonoma and Marin.

sections.heading: A neighborhood kitchen, not a chain
sections.intro: Ochoa's has fed Sebastopol for more than three decades the same way: real food, generous plates, and a counter where the staff knows the regulars by name.

items.title: Made fresh, made to order
items.body: Every plate is cooked when you order it — fresh chips and salsa to start, and salsas (red and green) made in-house.

items.title: Generous, honest plates
items.body: Locals say a single super burrito lasts two nights. Big portions at a fair price have kept this a town favorite for years.

items.title: Worth the drive
items.body: Fans cross the county — and come down from Marin — for the fish tacos and birria. People compare it to the best Mexican spots in San Diego.

items.title: Birria Tacos
items.description: Rich, slow-cooked birria in tasty, filling tacos — one of the most-asked-for things on the menu.

items.title: Chile Verde Burrito
items.description: A house favorite that balances savory and a little heat — the burrito regulars come back for.

items.title: Fish Tacos
items.description: The dish that brings people down from Marin. Fresh, flavorful, and compared to the best fish tacos in San Diego.

items.title: Breakfast & California Burritos
items.description: Breakfast burritos and the loaded California burrito — hearty, made to order, ready to go.

items.title: Chile Rellenos & Plates
items.description: Classic chile rellenos, carne asada, carnitas, and fajitas — full plates with rice and beans.

items.title: McDougall Vegan Burrito
items.description: An oil-free, vegan burrito built around steamed broccoli, cauliflower, and carrots in a whole-wheat tortilla — a longtime favorite of the health-minded Sebastopol crowd.

sections.heading: Tucked in next to Legacy, fresh as ever
sections.body: You'll find Ochoa's on Gravenstein Highway, right next to Sebastopol's beloved fabric shop Legacy — a small, recently refreshed space that's been a local go-to for more than 30 years.
points: Vegan & vegetarian options, including the McDougall burrito

sections.heading: Three decades of fresh Mexican food in Sebastopol
body: Ochoa's Mexican Restaurant has been part of Sebastopol for more than 30 years — a small, family-run kitchen on Gravenstein Highway that's built its reputation one plate at a time. The chefs take pride in cooking each meal to order, so every bite is fresh, and the salsas and chips are made in-house.

Over the years it's become the kind of place people are loyal to: regulars who've been coming for years, neighbors who swear by the chile verde, and out-of-towners who plan a Sonoma County trip around the fish tacos. It's tiny, it's friendly, and it does one thing extremely well — honest, fresh Mexican food.

items.quote: I love getting a few tacos with different meat — Ochoa's tacos were great.
items.author: Tripadvisor reviewer

items.quote: I've been coming here for years and love the McDougall burrito — it's vegan and tastes great!
items.author: Tripadvisor reviewer

items.quote: Consistently delicious! The super burritos last for two nights.
items.author: Tripadvisor reviewer

sections.heading: Hungry?
sections.body: Find us at 777 Gravenstein Hwy S, Sebastopol. Open Mon–Sat, 10am–9pm — call ahead or come on by.

sections.heading: Made to order, made fresh daily
sections.subheading: Tacos, burritos, and classic plates — plus house-made salsas and a vegan McDougall burrito. Here's what people order most.

items.title: Birria Tacos
items.description: Slow-cooked birria — rich, tasty, and filling. A signature.

items.title: Fish Tacos
items.description: Fresh and flavorful — the dish people drive in from Marin for.

items.title: Crispy Shrimp Tacos
items.description: Crisp shrimp tacos done right.

items.title: Carne Asada & Carnitas Tacos
items.description: Classic tacos with your choice of grilled steak or slow-cooked carnitas.

items.title: Chile Verde Burrito
items.description: Savory with a little heat — a longtime house favorite.

items.title: California Burrito
items.description: Loaded and hearty, made to order.

items.title: Breakfast Burrito
items.description: A morning favorite, ready to go.

items.title: Super Burrito
items.description: Generous enough to last two nights, regulars say.

items.title: Chicken Burrito
items.description: Grilled chicken, rice, beans, and the works.

items.title: McDougall Vegan Burrito
items.description: Oil-free and vegan — steamed broccoli, cauliflower, and carrots in a whole-wheat tortilla.

items.title: Chile Rellenos
items.description: Classic rellenos — a guest favorite.

items.title: Fajitas de Camarón
items.description: Shrimp fajitas, served sizzling.

items.title: Super Quesadilla Carne Asada
items.description: A loaded quesadilla with grilled steak.

items.title: Beans & Rice
items.description: The classic sides that round out every plate.

items.title: Steamed Veggies
items.description: Fresh steamed vegetables — a lighter, plant-based option.

items.title: Guacamole, Chips & Salsa
items.description: Fresh chips with house-made red and green salsas.

items.q: Do you have vegan or vegetarian options?
items.a: Yes. The McDougall burrito is oil-free and vegan, and there are veggie burritos, steamed vegetables, and other plant-based options.
Every plate is cooked to order, and the chips and red and green salsas are made in-house.
We're open Monday through Saturday, 10:00am–9:00pm. Closed Sunday.
777 Gravenstein Hwy S in Sebastopol, right next to the Legacy fabric shop.

sections.heading: Come hungry
sections.body: 777 Gravenstein Hwy S, Sebastopol. Open Mon–Sat, 10am–9pm.

sections.heading: A small family kitchen Sebastopol has trusted for 30+ years
sections.subheading: Fresh, made-to-order Mexican food on Gravenstein Highway — the same simple promise, plate after plate, for over three decades.

sections.heading: Three decades of fresh Mexican food in Sebastopol
body: Ochoa's Mexican Restaurant has been part of Sebastopol for more than 30 years — a small, family-run kitchen on Gravenstein Highway that's built its reputation one plate at a time. The chefs take pride in cooking each meal to order, so every bite is fresh, and the salsas and chips are made in-house.

Over the years it's become the kind of place people are loyal to: regulars who've been coming for years, neighbors who swear by the chile verde, and out-of-towners who plan a Sonoma County trip around the fish tacos. It's tiny, it's friendly, and it does one thing extremely well — honest, fresh Mexican food.

sections.heading: On Gravenstein Highway, next to Legacy
sections.body: Ochoa's sits on Gravenstein Highway south of downtown Sebastopol, tucked in beside the Legacy fabric shop — a small, recently refreshed space that's easy to miss and hard to forget.

sections.heading: Visit Ochoa's
sections.blurb: Find us at 777 Gravenstein Hwy S, Sebastopol, CA 95472, or call (707) 829-9338. Open Monday–Saturday, 10am–9pm; closed Sunday.
